title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
